presets.name: Python Beginner
presets.description: Perfect for students writing their first Python scripts. Large readable font, auto-formatting, and error hints to catch mistakes early.
presets.target_user: Students learning Python, first-time programmers, hobbyists

presets.name: Python Professional
presets.description: Advanced Python setup with type checking, testing tools, and production-ready configurations for working developers.
presets.target_user: Python developers working on production projects

presets.name: Competitive Programming
presets.description: Optimized for Codeforces, LeetCode, and contest coding. Fast I/O, code snippets, and one-key run with test cases.
presets.target_user: Competitive programmers, DSA learners, contest participants

presets.name: Java Student
presets.description: University-ready Java setup with Maven/Gradle support, JUnit testing, and student-friendly error explanations.
presets.target_user: Computer science students taking Java courses

presets.name: Web Dev - Frontend
presets.description: React, Vue, Tailwind, and modern frontend tools. Prettier + ESLint configured to work together. Emmet shortcuts enabled.
presets.target_user: Frontend developers, web design students, UI developers

presets.name: Web Dev - Fullstack
presets.description: Complete fullstack setup with Node.js, database tools, API testing, and Docker support for backend development.
presets.target_user: Fullstack developers, backend engineers, Node.js developers

presets.name: C/C++ Systems
presets.description: Low-level C/C++ development with CMake, Makefile support, debugger integration, and systems programming tools.
presets.target_user: Systems programmers, embedded developers, OS contributors

presets.name: Data Science
presets.description: Jupyter notebooks, pandas, matplotlib, and ML libraries. Optimized for data exploration and visualization workflows.

presets.name: DevOps & Cloud
presets.description: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and cloud CLI tools. SSH connections, YAML editing, and infrastructure as code support.

presets.name: Mobile (Flutter)
presets.description: Flutter and Dart development with hot reload optimization, device emulation, and mobile-specific debugging.

presets.name: Rust Systems
presets.description: Rust development with Cargo, clippy, rust-analyzer, and memory safety tooling. Optimized for systems programming.

presets.name: Go Backend
presets.description: Go/Golang development with gofmt, golint, and backend-specific optimizations. Fast compilation and testing workflows.
presets.target_user: Go developers, backend engineers, API developers

presets.name: Minimal Zen
presets.description: Distraction-free writing and coding. Hidden sidebars, zen mode, quiet colors. For those who want peace while they code.

presets.name: Streamer & Content Creator
presets.description: Optimized for screen recording and live streaming. High contrast, large fonts, beautiful on camera. Peacock for quick theme switching.

presets.name: Remote SSH Server
presets.description: Work on remote servers via SSH directly in VS Code. Optimized for terminal work, file sync, and server administration.
presets.target_user: DevOps engineers, remote workers, server administrators
